data.name: PERSEVERANCE: Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT THE GAME

Welcome to a masterfully crafted adult visual novel where every choice carves a unique path through a world of desire, conflict, and human connection. This isn't just a story — it's a completely personalized journey that responds dynamically to your decisions and evolves with each playthrough.

Our comprehensive character selection system offers unprecedented variety, allowing you to experience the game from diverse character perspectives. From traditional characters to alternative body types, dominant and submissive personalities — our character selection system ensures all players can explore this richly detailed world according to their own preferences.

Characters and their stories are completely independent from one another, each with its own unique narrative. Your choices reveal specific scenes and experiences within each character's story, but you'll explore a specially designed journey for each character. Whether you prefer to watch or participate — whichever role you choose, each character offers you a different world to discover.

TRACY'S STORY - CHAPTER 1 EXPERIENCE

CHAPTER 1 begins with Tracy, a character of psychological depth navigating a world filled with conflicting desires and difficult choices. This 22-year-old model is a woman questioning her understanding of love, loyalty, and personal freedom behind her confident exterior. Tracy's story chronicles how tensions with her boyfriend Jeff during a long journey and unexpected encounters shape her personal voyage of discovery.

Tracy's world is populated with characters each acting on their own agendas. From a desolate gas station to a motel in the middle of the desert, from a rural villa to a return to the city, the story explores a wide variety of relationship dynamics. As Tracy pushes her boundaries in unexpected encounters with experienced, mature characters, she occasionally finds herself at the center of multiple interactions. The narrative focuses on Tracy's experiences in different social circles both in Jeff's presence and absence, while power dynamics and boundaries between characters constantly shift.

This visual novel deeply explores mature themes, offering a narrative that challenges traditional boundaries of romantic relationships and presents different fantasies and individual preferences without judgment. While each character acts with their own free will, players take part in this dynamic world sometimes as observers, sometimes as directors.

This chapter 1 version begins with Tracy's story, lasting approximately 4-6 hours. Unexpected encounters with strangers, confrontations with authority, intimate moments with mature men, and interactions with multiple people simultaneously — all these elements are experiences unique to Tracy's world. Every location, from a care home to an isolated subway station, from luxurious villas to environments controlled by authorities, becomes a different test in Tracy's personal journey. This chapter, offering players the chance to explore specific scenes, is just the first step in a universe that will expand with completely different characters in the future.

During development, the game world will expand with the following characters:

• Iris: With her own unique story and relationship dynamics

• Victoria: Offering a perspective with completely different experiences

• 9 Additional Surprise Characters: Each with different personalities, body types, and story paths

In the full version, each character will have their own unique stories and offer independent experiences. While Tracy focuses on romantic conflicts, Iris might exist in a different context, and Victoria could explore entirely different types of relationships. Some characters will present traditional stories, while others will feature alternative relationship models, scenarios involving third parties, or completely different power dynamics. Each story will have its own distinct goal, with characters merely sharing the same universe.

Step into this unique universe and explore each character's special world. Whether you prefer to watch or participate — each character will offer you a different story and experience. Independent stories, one grand universe. Your journey begins now.

data.short_description: A comprehensive adult visual novel catering to all kinds of fantasies through a multi-character selection system. Explore different styles from futanari to NTR, age-gap relationships to group experiences. Be either an observer or a participant in the stories of Tracy and other characters.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
